  eventKeys.set(key, (eventKeys.get(key) || 0) + 1);   return event; }  function processSnapshot() {   try {     const out = execFileSync('ps', ['-eo', 'pid,lstart,cmd'], { encoding: 'utf8' });     return out.split('\n').filter((line) => /runDevApp|vite\.js|dist\/index\.mjs|api-server run dev|pyrus run dev:replit/.test(line));         const isVisible = (el) => {           const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);           const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();           return style.visibility !== 'hidden' && style.display !== 'none' && Number(style.opacity || '1') !== 0 && rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;
